mapper.sql: id,plant_code,generation, plant_number,plant_date,sample_code, transplant_date,vernalization_begin_date,vernalization_end_date, pollination_method,plant_status,pollination_date, harvest_date,harvest_type,other_field, edit_type,species_code,create_date, update_time,create_user_id,create_user_name, task_num,breed_code,source_code, remark,vector_task_code
mapper.insert:
insert into plant_single_stock_tb(id,plant_code,generation, plant_number,plant_date,sample_code, transplant_date,vernalization_begin_date,vernalization_end_date, pollination_method,plant_status,pollination_date, harvest_date,harvest_type,other_field, edit_type,species_code,create_date, update_time,create_user_id,create_user_name, task_num,breed_code,source_code, remark,vector_task_code) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.plantCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.plantNumber,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.plantDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.transplantDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.vernalizationBeginDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.vernalizationEndDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pollinationMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.plantStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.pollinationDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.harvestDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.harvestType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.otherField}, #{item.editType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.speciesCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{item.createUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.createUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.breedCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sourceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.vectorTaskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
